summary.lv: WeAreDots — Latvijas IT uzņēmums ar 25+ gadu pieredzi un Microsoft partneris — meklē .NET izstrādātāju ar vismaz 2 gadu pieredzi darbam ar C#/.NET, MS SQL/PostgreSQL un SOAP/RabbitMQ integrācijām; hibrīda darbs Rīgas centrā.
summary.en: WeAreDots, a Latvian IT company with 25+ years of experience and a Microsoft partner, is hiring a .NET Developer with 2+ years of experience in C#/.NET, MS SQL/PostgreSQL and SOAP/RabbitMQ integrations; hybrid in central Riga.
